mapper.select: select m.id, m.name, m.images, m.rating, m.total_reviews as totalReviews, m.avg_price as avgPrice, m.category, m.address, m.base_tags as baseTags, mt.custom_value as customValue from merchant m left join merchant_tag mt on m.id = mt.merchant_id where m.id = #{id}
select id, title, images, valid_time_desc as validTimeDesc, sold_count as soldCount, deal_price as dealPrice, original_price as originalPrice, discount from group_deal where merchant_id = #{id};

SELECT mc.id as id, mc.user_id, tu.nick_name, tu.icon as userIcon, mc.content as content, mc.create_time as createTime, mc.like_count likeCount, mc.rating FROM merchant_comment mc LEFT JOIN tb_user tu ON mc.user_id = tu.id WHERE mc.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND mc.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY mc.rating DESC, mc.create_time DESC LIMIT 3;

SELECT mc.id, mc.name, mc.actual_value AS actualValue, mc.begin_time, mc.rules, IF(uc.user_id IS NULL, FALSE, TRUE) AS userReceived FROM merchant_coupon mc LEFT JOIN user_coupon uc ON mc.id = uc.coupon_id AND uc.user_id = #{userId} WHERE mc.merchant_id = #{merchantId}
select id, merchant_id AS merchantId, title, images, original_price AS originalPrice, deal_price AS dealPrice, tags, valid_time_desc AS validTimeDesc from group_deal where id = #{id}

select uc.id, uc.coupon_id couponId, uc.merchant_id merchantId, uc.coupon_amount couponAmount, mc.name, mc.rules from user_coupon uc left join merchant_coupon mc on uc.merchant_id = mc.id where mc.id = #{merchantId} and uc.user_id = #{userId}
